positive: A central, highly detailed illustration of a majestic, stylized bioluminescent fox spirit amongst drifting nebulae. The fox should have strong, clean silhouettes and flowing tail elements that blend into cosmic dust. Incorporate elements of stylized sacred geometry (mandala patterns) subtly integrated into the fox's fur and the surrounding constellations. The overall composition must be symmetrical and centered, designed for optimal placement on apparel. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted with glowing neon magenta and electric cyan accents. The style should be a blend of intricate tattoo flash art and professional vector illustration, featuring ultra-fine linework and dramatic, glowing backlighting. Minimal shading, maximum contrast.
negative: lowres, blurry, noise, artifact, ugly, text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, amateur, grayscale
